mapper.sql: ID, COMP_CD, VD_CD, VD_NM, ITEM_CD, ITEM_NM, UNIT_CD, CURR_CD, TO_CHAR(APPLY_SD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS APPLY_SD, TO_CHAR(APPLY_ED,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS APPLY_ED, UNIT_PRC, SRC_TYP, SRC_ID, REMARK, REG_ID, TO_CHAR(REG_DT,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS REG_DT
mapper.select: SELECT FROM IP_ITEM_PRICE WHERE DEL_YN='N' AND COMP_CD=#{compCd} AND VD_CD=#{vdCd} AND ITEM_CD=#{itemCd} AND APPLY_SD <= TO_DATE(#{ed},'YYYY-MM-DD') AND APPLY_ED >= TO_DATE(#{sd},'YYYY-MM-DD') ORDER BY APPLY_SD
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO IP_ITEM_PRICE (COMP_CD, VD_CD, VD_NM, ITEM_CD, ITEM_NM, UNIT_CD, CURR_CD, APPLY_SD, APPLY_ED, UNIT_PRC, SRC_TYP, SRC_ID, REMARK, REG_ID, MOD_ID) VALUES (#{compCd}, #{vdCd}, #{vdNm}, #{itemCd}, #{itemNm}, #{unitCd}, NVL(#{currCd},'KRW'), TO_DATE(#{applySd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{applyEd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), NVL(#{unitPrc},0), #{srcTyp}, #{srcId}, #{remark}, #{regId}, #{regId})
mapper.update: UPDATE IP_ITEM_PRICE SET APPLY_ED=TO_DATE(#{applyEd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE IP_ITEM_PRICE SET APPLY_SD=TO_DATE(#{applySd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE IP_ITEM_PRICE SET DEL_YN='Y', MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO IP_PRICE_HIS (COMP_CD, VD_CD, ITEM_CD, CHG_TYP, OLD_SD, OLD_ED, OLD_PRC, NEW_SD, NEW_ED, NEW_PRC, SRC_TYP, SRC_ID, REG_ID) VALUES (#{compCd}, #{vdCd}, #{itemCd}, #{chgTyp}, #{oldSd}, #{oldEd}, #{oldPrc}, #{newSd}, #{newEd}, #{newPrc}, #{srcTyp}, #{srcId}, #{regId})
mapper.select: SELECT H.ID, H.VD_CD, H.ITEM_CD, H.CHG_TYP, C.CD_NM_KO AS CHG_TYP_NM, H.OLD_SD, H.OLD_ED, H.OLD_PRC, H.NEW_SD, H.NEW_ED, H.NEW_PRC, H.SRC_TYP, H.SRC_ID, H.REG_ID, TO_CHAR(H.REG_DT,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS REG_DT FROM IP_PRICE_HIS H LEFT JOIN CM_CODE C ON C.GRP_CD='IP_CHG_TYP' AND C.CD=H.CHG_TYP AND C.DEL_YN='N' WHERE 1=1 AND H.VD_CD=#{vdCd} AND H.ITEM_CD=#{itemCd} ORDER BY H.ID DESC
